hyperparameters.device: Device to run training on (e.g., 'cpu', 'cuda'). Default is 'cuda'.
hyperparameters.run_name: Name for the training run, used for logging and saving outputs.
hyperparameters.finetune_script_path: Path to the external fine-tuning script if required by your environment.
hyperparameters.validation_fraction: Fraction of the training set to set aside for validation (0.0 to 1.0). Default is 0.2.
hyperparameters.clean_after_training: Bool. If True, removes checkpoints and temporary trajectory files after successful training.
hyperparameters.load_model_path: Path to a starting model checkpoint (.pth) to begin fine-tuning from.
hyperparameters.save_checkpoint: Bool. Whether to save intermediate checkpoints during training.
hyperparameters.ckpt_interval: Number of epochs between saving checkpoints.
hyperparameters.threebody_cutoff: Cutoff distance for three-body interactions if applicable.
hyperparameters.batch_size: Number of structures per training batch.
hyperparameters.learning_rate: Initial learning rate for the optimizer.
hyperparameters.step_size: Period of learning rate decay (in epochs).
hyperparameters.include_forces: Bool. Whether to include force errors in the loss function.
hyperparameters.include_stresses: Bool. Whether to include stress errors in the loss function.
hyperparameters.force_loss_ratio: Weighting factor for forces in the total loss.
hyperparameters.stress_loss_ratio: Weighting factor for stresses in the total loss.
hyperparameters.early_stop_patience: Number of epochs to wait for improvement before stopping early.
hyperparameters.re_normalize: Bool. Whether to re-normalize the target data labels.
hyperparameters.scale_key: Key for scaling parameters in the model state dict.
hyperparameters.shift_key: Key for shift parameters in the model state dict.
hyperparameters.init_scale: Initial scaling value for the potential.
hyperparameters.trainable_scale: Bool. Whether the scale parameter is optimized during training.
hyperparameters.trainable_shift: Bool. Whether the shift parameter is optimized during training.
hyperparameters.wandb_project: W&B project name for run organization.

parameters_compute_properties.device: Device to run inference on ('cpu' or 'cuda'). GPU is highly recommended for deep learning models.

trained_pot_files.potential_file: pot.pth - The PyTorch state dictionary containing the fine-tuned weights.
